title: Abbily Origins 2
description: An origins and exploration focused pack for members of the Abbily discord server!
body:
A (relatively) small modpack focused on origins and exploration !

Included are many optimization and social mods! intended for a simple, comfy time between friends in a server :>

#### Notable additions:
- Origins and Origins++
- Coffins
- YUNG's Cave Biomes and Better Archeology
- Friends & Foes, Critters and Companions, Clutter

There are no tech mods (as much as i wanted to add them), this is purely intended to be a no progression, building and exploration focused pack.

### Please note:
There are some mods that you may want to tweak the configs for!
notably: There are several keybinds for the origins mod that have to be reconfigured for certain origins ! My personal setup is *very* different from the default
